Content:
# 🚀 The 80/20 DSA Interview Playbook

This is not a list of 500 random problems. This is the **highly curated, zero-BS** collection of the exact Data Structures & Algorithmic patterns that top tech companies (Microsoft, Amazon, Google, Meta, Apple) actually test in their technical rounds.

---

## 🛑 STEP 1: The Core Foundation (Do This First)

Before you begin grinding LeetCode, you need to make sure your core logic and data structure fundamentals are rock solid. If your foundational logic is weak, you will struggle to recognize these patterns during a live interview. 

Before diving into the patterns below, it is **highly recommended** that you brush up on your core logic using Microsoft's official, 100% free developer training hub.

👉 **[Access the Official Microsoft Developer Training Hub Here (DSA Fundamentals & Logic)](https://learn.microsoft.com/training/?wt.mc_id=studentamb_514816)**

*(Do not skip this step if your core fundamentals are rusty. Top companies care more about your underlying logic than your ability to memorize LeetCode solutions.)*

---

## 🧠 STEP 2: The Core DSA Patterns (The 80/20 Rule)

### 1. Sliding Window
*   [Maximum Average Subarray I](https://leetcode.com/problems/maximum-average-subarray-i/) (Easy)
*   [Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters](https://leetcode.com/problems/longest-substring-without-repeating-characters/) (Medium)
*   [Longest Repeating Character Replacement](https://leetcode.com/problems/longest-repeating-character-replacement/) (Medium)
*   [Max Consecutive Ones III](https://leetcode.com/problems/max-consecutive-ones-iii/) (Medium)
*   [Fruit Into Baskets](https://leetcode.com/problems/fruit-into-baskets/) (Medium)
*   [Minimum Window Substring](https://leetcode.com/problems/minimum-window-substring/) (Hard)
*   [Sliding Window Maximum](https://leetcode.com/problems/sliding-window-maximum/) (Hard)

### 2. Two Pointers
*   [Valid Palindrome](https://leetcode.com/problems/valid-palindrome/) (Easy)
*   [Two Sum II - Input Array Is Sorted](https://leetcode.com/problems/two-sum-ii-input-array-is-sorted/) (Medium)
*   [Remove Duplicates from Sorted Array](https://leetcode.com/problems/remove-duplicates-from-sorted-array/) (Easy)
*   [3Sum](https://leetcode.com/problems/3sum/) (Medium)
*   [4Sum](https://leetcode.com/problems/4sum/) (Medium)
*   [Container With Most Water](https://leetcode.com/problems/container-with-most-water/) (Medium)
*   [Sort Colors](https://leetcode.com/problems/sort-colors/) (Medium)
*   [Trapping Rain Water](https://leetcode.com/problems/trapping-rain-water/) (Hard)

### 3. Fast & Slow Pointers
Translation:
# 🚀 El Manual 80/20 para Entrevistas de Estructuras de Datos y Algoritmos

Esto no es una lista de 500 problemas aleatorios. Esta es la colección **altamente seleccionada y sin tonterías** de los patrones exactos de Estructuras de Datos y Algoritmos que las principales empresas tecnológicas (Microsoft, Amazon, Google, Meta, Apple) realmente evalúan en sus rondas técnicas.

---

## 🛑 PASO 1: La Fundación Básica (Haz Esto Primero)

Antes de comenzar a practicar en LeetCode, necesitas asegurarte de que tus fundamentos de lógica y estructuras de datos sean sólidos como una roca. Si tu lógica básica es débil, te costará reconocer estos patrones durante una entrevista en vivo.

Antes de sumergirte en los patrones a continuación, es **altamente recomendable** que repases tu lógica básica usando el centro oficial de capacitación para desarrolladores de Microsoft, 100% gratuito.

👉 **[Accede Aquí al Centro Oficial de Capacitación para Desarrolladores de Microsoft (Fundamentos DSA y Lógica)](https://learn.microsoft.com/training/?wt.mc_id=studentamb_514816)**

*(No omitas este paso si tus fundamentos están oxidados. Las principales empresas valoran más tu lógica subyacente que tu capacidad para memorizar soluciones de LeetCode.)*

---

## 🧠 PASO 2: Los Patrones Básicos de DSA (La Regla 80/20)

### 1. Ventana Deslizante
*   [Subarreglo con Promedio Máximo I](https://leetcode.com/problems/maximum-average-subarray-i/) (Fácil)
*   [Subcadena Más Larga Sin Caracteres Repetidos](https://leetcode.com/problems/longest-substring-without-repeating-characters/) (Medio)
*   [Reemplazo del Caracter Repetido Más Largo](https://leetcode.com/problems/longest-repeating-character-replacement/) (Medio)
*   [Máximo Número de Unos Consecutivos III](https://leetcode.com/problems/max-consecutive-ones-iii/) (Medio)
*   [Frutas en Cestas](https://leetcode.com/problems/fruit-into-baskets/) (Medio)
*   [Subcadena Mínima de Ventana](https://leetcode.com/problems/minimum-window-substring/) (Difícil)
*   [Máximo de Ventana Deslizante](https://leetcode.com/problems/sliding-window-maximum/) (Difícil)

### 2. Dos Punteros
*   [Palíndromo Válido](https://leetcode.com/problems/valid-palindrome/) (Fácil)
*   [Suma de Dos II - El Arreglo de Entrada Está Ordenado](https://leetcode.com/problems/two-sum-ii-input-array-is-sorted/) (Medio)
*   [Eliminar Duplicados de un Arreglo Ordenado](https://leetcode.com/problems/remove-duplicates-from-sorted-array/) (Fácil)
*   [3Sum](https://leetcode.com/problems/3sum/) (Medio)
*   [4Sum](https://leetcode.com/problems/4sum/) (Medio)
*   [Contenedor con Más Agua](https://leetcode.com/problems/container-with-most-water/) (Medio)
*   [Ordenar Colores](https://leetcode.com/problems/sort-colors/) (Medio)
*   [Atrapar Agua de Lluvia](https://leetcode.com/problems/trapping-rain-water/) (Difícil)

### 3. Punteros Rápido y Lento
